## Purpose of this Update
Briefly describe what you are changing (e.g., "Updating the Best-Available DOI for BL022" or "Adding wind-tunnel calibration report for BL026").

## Type of Change
Check all that apply:
- [ ] **Main Index Update**: Modified `main_data_index.csv` to update a Best-Available dataset.
- [ ] **Platform Metadata**: Updated `specs.yaml` or `README.md` for a specific aircraft.
- [ ] **Cal/QA Update**: Added new files to a `platforms/<id>/calibration/` directory.
- [ ] **Issue Fix**: This PR resolves a known technical problem, documented in an issue.

## Contributor Checklist
Before submitting, please confirm the following:
- [ ] My changes follow the **Golden Rule** (this is a technical fix/update, not a general discussion).
- [ ] If I updated the `main_data_index.csv`, I also updated the `last_mod` column for that row and added any Notes or References.
- [ ] If this PR fixes a "Known Problem," I have linked the Issue below (e.g., "Closes #12").
- [ ] Any new Zenodo (or other) DOIs have been verified as active and public.

## 🔗 Related Issues/Discussions
- **Linked Issue:** # (if applicable)
- **Relevant Discussion:** # (if this update came from a Data Quality Alert)

## Additional information
Add any other information or details here.
